title: PayPal PYPL Retail Investor Sentiment And Stock Discussion
text: Despite 26% decline in PayPal stock over past year, retail sentiment remains neutral. Michael Burry disclosed 3.5% position at $49, calling PayPal a top pick, causing retail sentiment to move to extremely bullish. Consensus remains cautious Hold with branded checkout stabilization as key metric. Mizuho downgraded PYPL to Neutral and cut target to $50 from $60, citing X Money as competitive threat to Venmo. Wall Street shows 10 Buy, 30 Hold, 4 Sell ratings from 44 analysts.
